description: In SecretStore::get() (lib.rs:221), data_size (a usize from NvPublic::data_size()) is cast to u16 with 'data_size as u16'. While the TPM2 spec defines TPMS_NV_PUBLIC.dataSize as UINT16 so the value should always fit, the cast is unchecked — if the tss-esapi wrapper ever returns a larger value (e.g. from a future spec revision or bug), the truncation is silent. Should use u16::try_from(data_size).map_err(...) to fail explicitly on overflow rather than silently truncating to a smaller read.
title: nv_read truncates data_size to u16 without check
